# KodeCite.ai

> KodeCite is an AI-readable website infrastructure practice. We rebuild and restructure business websites so AI systems can understand the business clearly, verify its identity, and trust its claims through corroborated sources.

[Full reference (expanded)](https://www.kodecite.ai/llms-full.txt)

KodeCite builds AI-readable website infrastructure for businesses that need to be understood, verified, and trusted by AI systems. Traditional websites were built for human visitors who scroll, read, and click. AI systems work differently — before they recommend a business they need to understand what it is, verify that it is real, and trust that its claims can be corroborated. KodeCite rebuilds the foundation beneath a website (server-rendered pages, a structured JSON-LD entity graph, answer-first content, and corroborated trust signals) on infrastructure the business owns.

## The CVT framework

KodeCite organizes AI visibility around CVT — Clarity, Verification, Trust.

- **Clarity**: AI can understand who the business is, what it does, where it serves, and what each page means. Built from site structure, answer-first content, clean service and location relationships, schema, internal linking, and clear entity definitions.
- **Verification**: AI can confirm the business identity across trusted profiles, directories, reviews, credentials, and structured data — Google Business Profile, Bing Places, Apple Maps, Yelp, BBB, licensing, NAP consistency, sameAs links, and matching JSON-LD.
- **Trust**: AI can corroborate what the business claims — through credible third-party sources, reviews, credentials, locations, citations, and schema relationships like mentions, sameAs, about, and spatialCoverage.

Trust is not what a business claims. Trust is what AI can corroborate.

## Services

- **Foundation Build**: a complete AI-readable rebuild (technical foundation, entity graph, answer-first structure, authority signals), handed off to the client. Built once. Owned forever.
- **SEO + AI Visibility Consulting**: a scoped audit and strategy plan for an existing site that needs diagnosis, structure, and AI visibility guidance.
- **Content Architecture**: a structure plan for what a site should say, how pages should connect, and how AI systems should read it.
- **Machine Read** (free): a plain-English report on what AI systems can and can't understand, verify, and trust about a business right now.

You own everything (GitHub + Vercel). No platform lock-in. No required monthly retainer. Scoped engagements, plain-English explanations.

- Business locality: Coeur d'Alene, Idaho

## Authority signals

- Server-rendered Next.js on Vercel edge — full HTML on the first request
- Structured JSON-LD entity graph; schema validation: 0 invalid items
- Founder: Mark Abplanalp — 23 years operating service businesses, 30 years in sales
